issues.description: Action should be 'RevealFromHand' not 'TrashFromHand'. The card text says 'Reveal 1 card from the top of your Life cards', not trash. Trashing is only a cost option ('You may trash this Character').
Second action should reveal from Life cards (deck equivalent), not 'RevealFromHand'. Text explicitly states 'Reveal 1 card from the top of your Life cards'.
Duration should be 'DuringOpponentTurn' not 'EndOfTurn'. Text states 'until the end of your opponent's next turn', which is a conditional duration tied to opponent's turn phase.
Filter uses 'maxCost' but should specify exact cost of 5, or clarify as 'cost':5. Additionally, 'Monkey.D.Luffy' needs proper type/name filtering structure.
